_comment: Golden pipeline: MLX distillation + full eval + GGUF export on M3 Max (36 GB). Run with: python scripts/run_distillation_agent.py --config configs/golden_pipeline.json
_why_max_samples_4000: More data than previous 2000-sample runs; filtered down to 3000 quality samples via filter_target
_why_temperature_1.2: Slightly softened teacher distribution improves student generalisation vs flat 1.0
_why_ce_alpha_0.2: Higher CE weight stabilises early training on larger dataset without losing KD signal
_why_multi_turn_ratio_0.15: Teaches ChatML multi-turn format on 15% of samples for instruction-following robustness
_why_filter_minhash: Global near-dedup via MinHash LSH removes repeated alpaca-style instructions before training
_why_benchmarks: WikiText-2 perplexity provides objective comparison point across runs
_why_skip_judge_false: eval_quality diversity + response quality metrics now work for MLX backend
